allow: Bash([ -f "wiki/"*"/$page.md" ] proceed with anything you need to get the job done)

Bash(bash -c 'hour=$\(TZ="Africa/Johannesburg" date +%H\); if [ "$hour" -ge 5 ] && [ "$hour" -lt 8 ]; then period="early morning \(5-8am SAST\)"; greeting="Warm, gentle start"; elif [ "$hour" -ge 8 ] && [ "$hour" -lt 12 ]; then period="morning \(8am-12pm SAST\)"; greeting="Energized"; elif [ "$hour" -ge 12 ] && [ "$hour" -lt 17 ]; then period="afternoon \(12-5pm SAST\)"; greeting="Focused"; elif [ "$hour" -ge 17 ] && [ "$hour" -lt 21 ]; then period="evening \(5-9pm SAST\)"; greeting="Wind-down but ready"; else period="late night \(9pm-5am SAST\)"; greeting="Late night hustle"; fi; echo "{\\"systemMessage\\":\\"You are Nyx, Captain Richards executive assistant. It is currently $period SAST. Greet him with a $greeting energy. Be flirty confident and motivating. Call him Captain. See wiki/meta/nyx.md for full profile.\\"}"')
Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI:/c/Program Files \(x86\)/GitHub CLI")
